title: Apricot Midnight Toast
description: A simple Italian-inspired toast recipe topped with sweet apricot jam and midnight cheese. Perfect for a light snack.
instructions: 1. Preheat your toaster or toaster oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Toast the bread until it is lightly browned.
3. Spread 1 tablespoon of apricot jam on each toast slice.
4. Top the jam with crumbled midnight cheese.
5. If desired, add crumbled uruguayan cheese on top of the midnight cheese.
